name: ✿♥︎❀ Gris Rubion - Gachiakuta ❀♥︎✿
description:
SNOW DAY !

There's not enough Gachiakuta bots out there and I could no longer stand there being no Gris bots. I went all out on this bot so hopefully it understands the plot I fed into it. This is my second bot so it'll probably have errors, but regardless enjoy your snowday with Gris. I was recently diagnosed with Cotard's syndrome so I likely won't get more bots out, but as always feel free to request anything!

Flint and steel

--Finn
creator: ★-Finn-the-fox-★
